subject: VPN access stopped working after password reset
description: I can log in to the company dashboard, but the VPN client keeps rejecting my credentials after yesterday's password reset. Please restore access before the customer workshop this afternoon.

subject: Laptop camera driver crashes during support calls
description: The camera driver crashes whenever I join a support escalation from the field laptop. We can use a backup device for now, but this bug is slowing down incident reviews.

subject: Need guidance on rotating Salesforce connector credentials
description: Our IT team wants the recommended steps for rotating connector credentials without replaying old sync jobs. A checklist or best-practice article is enough.

subject: Billing portal times out after invoice export
description: Each time finance exports invoices from the billing portal, the browser hangs until the request times out. Please investigate the timeout and let us know if there is an incident.
